title: ElNet PFC Controller | Control Applications
content_html:
ElNet PFC power factor improvement controller

Support for up to 6 levels.
Continuous display of power multiplier
Measurement of voltage, current, and harmonics.
Weekly and monthly view of the power multiplier.
Automatic detection of capacitor values.
protection of harmonies.
Setting limits for voltage and current.
measurement accuracy 0.2%
1,600 samples per measurement wave.
320X240 color LCD display.
Support for multiple languages.
Simple and easy panel installation.

Related products
